notes: Evidence rules for A-share leader research. Seed-list claims are research priors; dynamic Tushare and theme data provide confirmation evidence.

tier_rules.evidence_confirmed: Has an industry-role seed or manual claim, at least two hard evidence items, and evidence_score >= 70.
tier_rules.strong_candidate: Has an industry-role seed or manual claim, but confirmation evidence is still incomplete.
tier_rules.market_hot_candidate: No industry-role seed yet, but theme binding and market confirmation are strong.
tier_rules.insufficient_evidence: Only weak evidence is available; keep in research backlog and do not treat as a confirmed leader.

source_rules.trigger: Manually maintained candidate seed. Used for recall, not standalone proof.
Current mainline keywords match stock name, industry, or market board.
Total market value percentile is at least 90%.
Trading amount percentile is at least 80%.
Large-order net inflow is positive and flow percentile is at least 70%.
